verses.1: The wicked flee when no one pursues;
verses.2: In rebellion, a land has many rulers,
verses.3: A needy man who oppresses the poor
verses.4: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked;
verses.6: Better is the poor who walks in his integrity
verses.7: Whoever keeps the law is a wise son;
verses.8: He who increases his wealth by excessive interest
verses.9: He who turns away his ear from hearing the law,
verses.10: Whoever causes the upright to go astray in an evil way,
verses.11: The rich man is wise in his own eyes;
verses.12: When the righteous triumph, there is great glory;
verses.13: He who conceals his sins doesn’t prosper,
verses.14: Blessed is the man who always fears;
verses.15: As a roaring lion or a charging bear,
verses.17: A man who is tormented by blood guilt will be a fugitive until death.
verses.18: Whoever walks blamelessly is kept safe;
verses.19: One who works his land will have an abundance of food;
verses.20: A faithful man is rich with blessings;
verses.21: To show partiality is not good,
verses.22: A stingy man hurries after riches,
verses.23: One who rebukes a man will afterward find more favor
verses.24: Whoever robs his father or his mother and says, “It’s not wrong,”
verses.25: One who is greedy stirs up strife;
verses.26: One who trusts in himself is a fool;
verses.27: One who gives to the poor has no lack;
verses.28: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves;
